div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 598px; height: 1px; padding-top: 30px; margin-left: 441px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #0f172a;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #0f172a; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: CLPR Network Layer — Ledger Configuration Exchange

switch.text: CLPR Network Layer — Ledger Configuration Exchange

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 598px; height: 1px; padding-top: 52px; margin-left: 441px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #94a3b8;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: #94a3b8; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Each Connection stores both rosters. Endpoint nodes synchronize configurations via state proofs.

switch.text: Each Connection stores both rosters. Endpoint nodes synchronize configurations via state proofs.
